description: In May of 2018, I left my career as an English teacher to pursue my passion of interior decorating. Turning thrift store finds into beautiful and useful home decor gives me such joy. My own home has always been a work in progress as I experiment with new trends and classic designs testing my skills as I paint, reupholster, knock down walls, wallpaper, build furniture, and much more. It is my hope that this channel will inspire and instruct others to create a beautiful home on a budget. For more budget friendly decorating inspiration check out my Canterbury Cottage Facebook, Pinterest, and Instagram accounts. description: Hello 👋🏻, we're Emily & Roberto, we are building a complete off-grid homestead from scratch on 5 acres of abandoned land in rural Italy.
